subtitle: Senior Data & Analytics Leader -- Data Function End-to-End | Production ML | Regulatory Rigor
summary_text: Senior data and technology leader with 14 years owning the data function end-to-end at Money Management International -- a national 501(c)(3) financial services nonprofit operating under continuous regulatory scrutiny across all 50 states plus federal regulators (HIPAA, PCI-DSS, CARD Act, CFPB). DBA / SQL Architect origin, enterprise data warehouse maturation, and production ML deployment via DataRobot for credit and servicing decisions. Built the cross-functional data-definitions discipline that aligned metric calculations across functions with divergent incentives -- the single-source-of-truth governance work that data platforms are usually hired to enable. Currently consulting on AI architecture, automation, and implementation -- including a structured evaluation methodology adopted by a national CX consulting firm.

bullets: Designed an algorithmic AI architecture evaluation framework -- scoring rubric, capability taxonomy, evaluation flow -- adopted by a national CX consulting firm to compare enterprise AI platforms with explicit governance, integration-fit, and capability dimensions.

Provide client-facing advisory on generative and agentic AI architectures, automation, and implementation; translate executive priorities into architectural trade-offs and concrete platform decisions for enterprise environments.
Hands-on AI-assisted engineering daily with Claude and GitHub Copilot; published thinking on AI adoption realities, the automation-vs-AI distinction, and reflexive AI governance practice on LinkedIn.

Directed enterprise technology for a national 501(c)(3) nonprofit providing financial counseling, debt management, and consumer financial education -- under continuous regulatory scrutiny across all 50 states plus federal regulators including the CFPB, with HIPAA, PCI-DSS, and CARD Act overlays.

Owned the data function end-to-end for 14 years -- DBA / SQL Architect origin, enterprise data-warehouse maturation (reactive reporting -> proper DW -> self-service trajectory), and production ML deployment via DataRobot for credit and servicing use cases at scale.

Led cross-functional data-definitions discipline across 12+ executive and operations stakeholders -- agreement on metric calculations, definitions, and the cross-team incentive conflicts that surface around them. The single-source-of-truth governance work.
Owned data governance and quality frameworks under continuous regulatory scrutiny; sustained 100% PCI-DSS certification across multiple audit cycles alongside HIPAA and CARD Act compliance.

Directed BI / analytics maturation on Power BI, Tableau, and SQL-based data warehousing; transitioned the organization from reactive reporting to predictive ML in production for credit-decision and servicing workflows.

Owned multi-year platform roadmap for MMI's homegrown ERP/CRM for 8 years across 12+ executive and operations stakeholders; multi-factor prioritization model (ROI x user satisfaction x efficiency x cross-departmental equity) governed sprint-over-sprint decisions across a 45-50 person delivery organization.
Advanced through progressive roles: DBA / SQL Architect -> IT Manager -> VP IT -> first CTO in the organization's 45+ year history; built and led a 35+ direct (75+ extended) technology team.

Founded and ran a web development and IT consulting firm for 17 years -- full P&L ownership; delivered custom digital solutions for dozens of clients across content-driven and transactional verticals.
Architected and operated a proprietary commercial-grade CMS supporting dozens of production sites; direct client engagement across discovery, scope, architecture, build, and ongoing support.

skills.items: Enterprise Data Strategy, Data Governance, Data Warehousing, Data Pipelines, Power BI, Tableau, DataRobot (Production ML), Cross-Functional Data Definitions
SQL / T-SQL, MSSQL, MySQL, PostgreSQL -- DBA / SQL Architect origin
Microsoft Azure, Azure DevOps, GitHub, CI/CD, Cloud Migration
Generative AI, Agentic AI, AI Architecture Evaluation, LLM Platforms, AI Governance
PCI-DSS, HIPAA, CARD Act, CFPB, Multi-State Regulatory, GRC Programs
Agile/SAFe, SDLC Modernization, ePMO Governance, Multi-Stakeholder Roadmap, Multi-Factor Prioritization
